svg.title: matthew chin — incoming chemical engineering @ mcmaster '30, chinos — local-first voice ai os
svg.desc: A dark terminal window titled "matt@mac ~" running the command "chin status". It prints: matthew chin · oakville, on; incoming chemical engineering @ mcmaster '30; building, chinos — local-first voice ai os; shipped, octet · promptly · ai-concept-map; stack, swift · rust · python · gdscript · typescript; focus, local-first agents, aimed at biomedical ai. A slowly drifting network of nodes and connecting lines fills the right side of the window.
